summary: V3 Dashboard Correction Testing Complete - All 19 tests passed (100%). Fixed missing analysis prop in N3Execution component. All indicator placements now correct: N2 has VWAP+VP, N3 has OFI+TICK, Technical excludes VIX/Gamma/VP/VWAP with no Predictive/Confirmatory division. V3 Hero shows N2+N3 side by side. Target asset prominently displayed. Chart follows regime target by default.
passed_tests: ✅ V3 Hero shows N2 Filtro AND N3 Execution side by side (grid-cols-2)
✅ Target asset (MES) prominently displayed in dedicated box
✅ Chart defaults to regime target asset (MES)
✅ REGIME badge shown in left sidebar next to target asset
✅ Clicking asset overrides chart (reset button appears)
✅ N1 summary shows VIX, GEX, TS, YC values in compact row
✅ N2 contains VWAP + Volume Profile (NOT TICK/CVD/OFI)
✅ N2 summary shows VWAP distance and VP Daily position
✅ N3 contains OFI and TICK Index (NOT Entry/SL/TP)
✅ N3 summary shows OFI signal and TICK value
✅ Technical excludes VIX, GAMMA_EXPOSURE, VOLUME_PROFILE, VWAP
✅ All 4 sidebar sections have uniform layout (bg-zinc-900/30)
✅ N1 expands to show VIX, VXN, Gamma, Term Structure, Treasury panels
✅ N2 expands to show VWAP multi-session and Volume Profile panels
✅ N3 expands to show OFI and TICK Index panels
✅ Technical expands to show CVD and indicator cards
test_credentials: No auth needed - public API endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: V3 Dashboard corrections verified. Key changes from iteration 19: 1) N2 now correctly contains VWAP + Volume Profile (was TICK/CVD/OFI). 2) N3 now correctly contains OFI + TICK (was Entry/SL/TP). 3) Technical now excludes VIX/Gamma/VP/VWAP and has no Predictive/Confirmatory division. 4) V3 Hero shows N2 Filter + N3 Execution side by side in grid-cols-2 layout. 5) Target asset (MES) prominently displayed in dedicated box. 6) Chart follows regime target by default, manual click overrides. 7) All 4 sidebar sections use uniform bg-zinc-900/30 (no colored backgrounds). 8) Fixed missing analysis prop in N3Execution component to enable OFI/TICK panels.
